rulings.Case Title: METROPOLIS PARTNERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. 365 MAIN INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, March 2, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT ROCKWOOD CAPITAL CORPORATION'S Motion To File Documents Under Seal. Motion to file documents under seal denied, without prejudice. Request not narrowly tailored. Moving party to see February 9, 2009 Order Permitting records to be filed under seal or redacted; that order covered many of the same documents that are present in this motion. =(302/CWWVC)
